_comment: Tradeable sweep roster. One entry per (symbol,dte) profile the Spreads dashboard exposes. 'protected:true' = sweep-manager refuses destructive ops without --force-spx. 'class' (index|etf) drives the liquid width caps; geometry itself is strike-COUNT x strikeInterval so NDX($10) vs QQQ($1) scale correctly. Data vendor is Polygon ONLY (ThetaData removed 2026-05-17). Backfill is now registry-driven: resolveTarget (backfill-replay-options) + BASES (sweep-symbol) fall back to this file, and getUnderlyingDay fetches the underlying from Polygon when no 0DTE parquet exists — so 'sweep-manager onboard --symbol X --dte N --days K' works for a genuinely new ticker with zero code edits. underlyingPolygonTicker: indices need the I: prefix, ETFs/equities use the bare ticker. bandHalfWidthDollars: strike band = lastClose +/- this.

profiles.note: cash-settled index, 0DTE tradeable — DEFAULT dashboard dataset, never auto-wiped
physically-settled ETF, broker blocks 0DTE near expiry -> 1DTE; $1 strikes, tight liquid range
physically-settled ETF -> 1DTE; $1 strikes, tight liquid range
